title: tetragonia rangeana
intro: Tetragonia rangeana, also known as Rangeana or Rangeana spinach, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, native to Australia. This succulent plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Tetragonia rangeana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and provide antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, Tetragonia rangeana is often consumed as a leafy green or used in teas, infusions, and capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
